meta.main_title: {airport}{showCity, select, yes {, {city}} other {}} ({iata}) Flight Board | Live Arrivals & Departures
meta.main_description: Live flight board at {airport} ({iata}) today: real-time arrivals and departures with flight status, times, delays and gates.
meta.arrivals_title: {airport}{showCity, select, yes {, {city}} other {}} ({iata}) Arrivals | Live Flight Board
meta.departures_title: {airport}{showCity, select, yes {, {city}} other {}} ({iata}) Departures | Live Flight Board
meta.arrivals_description: Live arrivals board at {airport} ({iata}) today: real-time arrivals and departures, flight status, times, delays and gates.
meta.departures_description: Live departures board at {airport} ({iata}) today: real-time departures and arrivals, flight status, times, delays and gates.

home.headline: Live flight boards for 6,000+ airports
home.subline: Arrivals and departures for 6,000+ airports worldwide. Updated every minute.
home.country_desc: Live arrivals and departures for all {count} airports in {country}. Real-time flight status, updated every minute.
home.az_desc: All airports starting with the letter {letter} — live arrivals and departures, updated every minute.
home.faq_iata_q: What is the IATA code for {name}?
home.faq_icao_q: What is the ICAO code for {name}?
home.faq_arrive_q: How early should I arrive at {name}?
home.faq_arrive_a: For international flights, arrive at least 3 hours before departure; for domestic flights, about 2 hours.
home.faq_live_q: How can I see live flights at {name}?
home.faq_live_a: This page shows live arrivals and departures for {name} ({iata}), updated every minute.
home.footer_tagline: Live airport boards for 6,000+ airports worldwide. Arrivals and departures in real time, updated every minute.
home.city_desc: All airports in {city} ({count}): live arrivals & departures, flight status, updated every minute.
home.route_desc: Flights {from} ({iata1}) → {to} ({iata2}): schedules, airlines, live status, updated every minute.
home.flight_desc: Flight {flight} status: live arrival/departure times, gate, terminal, delays, and real-time tracking.
home.flight_notfound: Flight {flight} not found or not scheduled today.
home.airline_desc: {airline} ({iata}) flights: live status, departures and arrivals, schedule, delays, real-time tracking.
home.airline_none: No active flights for {airline} right now.
home.data_note: Flight times may change — always verify with your airline or the airport.

ui.notice_board: Please be at the gate early. The gate closes strictly on schedule.
ui.notice_final: Head to the gate now. Boarding is not allowed once the gate closes.
ui.notice_ontime: Arrive at the airport early to complete all procedures.
ui.notice_delayed: The departure time has changed. Keep an eye on the board.

notfound.title: Page not found
notfound.text: We couldn’t find that page. Search for an airport or head back home.

legal.cookie_msg: We use cookies for analytics and advertising.
